# `SetScreenLocation`

**Systems:** C64,  PLUS4, C128, VIC20, MEGA65  
**Parameters:** `n`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Sets the location of the screen.
<h3>VIC-20</h3>
<code>
SetScreenLocation($1000); // screen located at $1000
</code>
Value must be $1000,$1400,$1800, $1C00, $8000, $8400, $8800 or $8C00
<h3>C64/C128</h3>
Value must be $X000, $X400,$X800 or $Xc00  where X can be 0-F

Not implemented yet. 


</div>
